# Release Checklist

## Scope and validation
- [ ] Scope is bounded and acceptance criteria are satisfied.
- [ ] Required automated tests passed.
- [ ] Required manual or exploratory checks were completed.

## Risk and rollout
- [ ] Security, compliance, migration, and rollback impacts were reviewed.
- [ ] Observability changes or post-release checks are documented.
- [ ] Feature flags or staged rollout decisions are explicit.

## Project Memory
- [ ] Relevant `docs/ai/*` files were updated.
- [ ] Open risks or deferred work are recorded in `docs/ai/STATUS.md`.

## Handoff
- [ ] PR template is complete.
- [ ] Release notes or communication needs are captured.
- [ ] Ownership for post-release monitoring is clear.
